overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character traversing a remote forest trail at night. The character walks along a dirt path through pine forests and rocky terrain, encountering hostile zombie-like creatures, with the camera eventually tilting up to reveal a star-filled night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural highway shoulder transitioning to forest trail

events.description: character turns off the paved road onto a narrow dirt trail heading uphill into the forest

agents.ego_description: walking away from the highway up a dirt path into the forested hills, weapons visible on back

entered.detail: green directional road sign with white text indicating distances to locations
asphalt road surface with a vehicle visible in the distance
unpaved hiking path leading uphill into the wilderness
dense coniferous trees lining both sides of the trail
rocky terrain and boulders on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a rural highway shoulder with a green road sign visible. The character turns onto a dirt trail and begins ascending into a forested mountain area. The environment is dark with clear night skies, and the path is surrounded by pine trees and rocky outcrops.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain trail with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill on the narrow dirt trail surrounded by dense pine forest

entered.detail: large gray rock formation beside the trail
blue colored vehicle or container visible in the distance among the rocks

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending the narrow forest trail, moving deeper into the wilderness. The highway is now out of view, replaced by dense pine forest and rocky terrain. An abandoned blue vehicle becomes visible in the distance as the path winds uphill.

scene_state.functional_zone: hostile encounter zone on forest trail

events.description: character approaches a downed zombie-like creature lying prone on the right side of the path
second creature lunges from the left side of the trail and is engaged by the character

agents.ego_description: walking past one downed creature then dispatching a second hostile that attacks from the left side of the trail

notable_agents.action: zombie-like creature in red clothing lying motionless on the ground
hostile creature lunging from the bushes to attack the character

entered.detail: dead tree trunk lying beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character encounters hostile entities on the trail, first passing a downed zombie-like creature in red clothing, then engaging a second creature that attacks from the left. The combat is brief as the character continues moving forward through the rocky forest terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ridge trail with panoramic night sky

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal a vast starry night sky with visible nebula clouds

agents.ego_description: continuing up the trail while observing the star-filled night sky and surrounding mountain horizon

entered.detail: clear night sky filled with stars and purple nebula clouds
distant mountain silhouettes against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a more open section of the trail with sparse vegetation. The camera tilts upward to showcase a spectacular starry night sky with visible nebula formations, before returning to the path as the character continues walking toward the distant mountain horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a roadside entrance into a dense, hostile mountain wilderness that eventually opens up to a celestial vista. It begins at a rural highway shoulder by a green road sign, where the camera follows the character as they turn onto a dirt trail and ascend into a dark, pine-filled forest. As the highway vanishes from view, the path winds deeper into the rocky terrain and passes an abandoned blue vehicle before shifting into a tense encounter with hostile, zombie-like creatures. The scene then expands into a more open section of the trail with sparse vegetation, where the camera tilts upward to reveal a spectacular starry sky filled with nebula formations. Finally, the view returns to the path as the character continues their journey toward the distant mountain horizon.
